build.prompt_append: Hard gate: every completed task MUST append updates to .sisyphus/progress.md and .sisyphus/requirements.md. If either file is not updated, task is NOT complete. If user asks segmented polish/review/verification/parallel processing (keywords: 润色, 分段, 核对, 并行), immediately switch to multi-agent parallel workflow in current session.

plan.prompt_append: All plans must include explicit recorder actions: requirements update + progress update checkpoints. A plan without ledger updates is invalid.
